title: hypericum richeri subsp. richeri
intro: Hypericum richeri subsp. richeri, also known as St. John's Wort, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Western Asia, belonging to the St. John's Wort genus. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high concentration of hypericin and hyperforin, which have been traditionally used to treat mild to moderate depression, anxiety, and sleep disorders. The health benefits of St. John's Wort include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may also help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote relaxation and improve mood.
